name: Devoted to the Brew

abilities.name: High Tolerance
abilities.text: When this model would be dealt damage from a Poison token, it instead heals 1 and removes the Poison token.

abilities.name: Closing Time
abilities.text: During the end phase, one model with this ability may remove a friendly Poison token from itself. If it does so, it makes a Scheme marker within 1" of itself.

actions.name: Liquid Courage
actions.effects: Target heals 2 and gains Poison and Bolstered tokens.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: The trigger for Liquid Courage uses a book icon which typically indicates a general trigger that can be taken with any suit or mask suit
